name: Math Calculator - MathNote
description: CalcNote-style expense calculator. Write  Label  expression |  on any line and the result appears in the right column. Includes a live 75/25 split panel and a toolbar button to write results back into the note.
author: Parth Gala

screenshots.title: Toolbar button and calculation panel with example

promo_tile.title: Math Calculator - MathNote
promo_tile.description: Quickly calculate maths between notes and preview and add back the answer with totals, grandtotal and expense lines directly in Joplin.
